headline: TVS Ntorq 150 vs Yamaha Aerox 155: Which Sporty Scooter Deserves Your Money in 2026?
summary: The TVS Ntorq 150 is the stronger value pick for city riders who want sporty styling, connected features and easier daily usability. The Yamaha Aerox 155 is the better performance scooter, with more power, higher claimed mileage and a more premium maxi-scooter feel.
seo_title: TVS Ntorq 150 vs Yamaha Aerox 155: 2026 Comparison
meta_description: TVS Ntorq 150 vs Yamaha Aerox 155 compared on price, engine, power, torque, mileage, top speed, features, comfort and value for money.
author: AutoTech Daily Bike Desk

facebook_post:
Sporty scooter buyers, this is the comparison that matters in 2026.

TVS Ntorq 150 brings the stronger value, better city-friendly dimensions and more connected features. Yamaha Aerox 155 hits back with more power, higher mileage claims and a premium maxi-scooter feel.

Which one would you buy?

Check the full story on our blog.
